name: Mark Bristow
background: Mark Bristow was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer of Barrick in January 2019 following the merger with Randgold Resources. He was previously the founder and CEO of Randgold Resources since its inception in 1995. He holds a PhD in Geology from the University of Natal, South Africa.

commpanies.name: Barrick Gold Corporation
commpanies.title_or_role: Director, President and Chief Executive Officer
